description: The command line of this process was modified from its original form prior to finalizing process creation. This might be related to command line stomping attacks. Investigate the process tree.
name: CommandLineStomping

description: A process made a suspiciously high volume of outbound network requests.

name: UmppcBypassSuspected

threatgraph_indicators.description: A process appears to have performed a system call by bypassing UMPPC hooks.
The command line of this process was modified from its original form prior to finalizing process creation. This might be related to command line stomping attacks. Investigate the process tree.

A process appears to be using a Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) application in a suspicious manner. This may be an attempt to gather information, gain access, or drop other malicious payloads. Investigate the process tree and the detected process.
A process appears to be suspiciously executing code via Powershell. Investigate the command line and process tree.

A process made a suspiciously high volume of outbound network requests.
Directory Services changes were replicated. If the source host is not a Domain Controller, this could represent a malicious attempt to dump credentials. Review the source host and user.
